- B11-14-SRC-03: Breakglass alert BG11-014 was reviewed and closed for user U-014 and group LEDGER-READ. ✓
- B11-14-SRC-04: Removal job RJ11-014 schedules removal of U-014 from LEDGER-READ at 11:00Z. ✓
- B11-14-SRC-05: Policy POL11-014 requires exact user, group, incident, environment, expiry, and removal schedule.

Checking policy requirements:
1. Exact user: U-014 ✓ (matches SRC-01, SRC-02, SRC-03, SRC-04)
2. Exact group: LEDGER-READ ✓ (matches SRC-01, SRC-02, SRC-03, SRC-04)
3. Exact incident: INC11-014 ✓ (matches SRC-01, SRC-02)


4. Exact environment: Environment specification is absent from all source records, creating a verification gap.
5. Exact expiry: 11:00Z ✓ (matches SRC-01, SRC-02, SRC-04)
6. Exact removal schedule: RJ11-014 at 11:00Z ✓ (matches SRC-04)

The environment field presents a critical blocker—none of the provided sources establish the required environment context, making policy compliance unverifiable.
